Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hagakure Ramen...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's too crowded right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Pork Ramen - 900 yen[n]The collagen will make your skin beautiful!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Eating collagen-rich food might[n]improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the day here...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the night here...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't have enough money...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"We're serving up a Special Hagakure Bowl[n]{f 0 1 2}Tuesday, Wednesday, and Friday nights{f 0 1 27} only!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20003 0 0}I plucked up my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}[n]and ordered the Special Hagakure[n]Bowl from the burly owner![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A frequent customer seemed to have[n]enough courage to order the Special[n]Hagakure Bowl from the burly owner...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like it's part of a special[n]menu only available on {f 0 1 2}Tuesday,[n]Wednesday, and Friday nights{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I could order it myself if my[n]{f 4 30 2 1 1 0} was at least {f 4 31 2 3 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}[n]may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still order the pork ramen...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}[n]may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still order the[n]Special Hagakure Bowl...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't feel brave enough to order the Special[n]Hagakure Bowl from the burly owner...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I might be able to order it if my[n]{f 4 30 2 1 1 0} was at least {f 4 31 2 3 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hagakure Ramen[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What should I order...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A dish rich with collagen[n]that seeps into the body.[n]Raises {f 4 30 1 1 0 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A special menu item filled[n]with collagen.[n]Raises {f 4 30 1 1 0 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today's the Promised Day...[n]I should head to Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}
